title: Senior Service Sales Engineer / Asst Manager
description:
Job Description:

• Provide guidance, coaching, and leadership to the maintenance sales team, fostering a collaborative and motivated environment.

• Collaborate with senior management to develop and execute effective sales strategies, including identifying target markets, setting sales goals, and defining sales tactics.

• Build and maintain strong relationships with key clients, addressing their needs, identifying opportunities for upselling or cross-selling, and ensuring client satisfaction.

• Lead efforts to identify and pursue new business opportunities, expanding the company’s client base and market presence in the maintenance sector.

• Manage the entire sales process, from lead generation and qualification to proposal development, negotiation, and contract signing.

• Track and analyze sales performance, pipeline progression, and key performance indicators (KPIs), providing regular reports to senior management.

• Collaborate with the sales team to create compelling and tailored proposals and presentations that effectively communicate the value of maintenance services.

• Stay updated with industry trends, market developments, and competitor activities to adjust sales strategies and stay competitive.

• Engage directly with clients to understand their needs, present solutions, and address inquiries, building trust and long-term relationships.

• Collaborate with internal departments, such as technical teams, operations, and marketing to ensure seamless project execution and customer satisfaction.

• Assist in the development and management of sales budgets, forecasting revenue projections, and managing expenses.

• Develop training programs to enhance the sales team’s product knowledge, sales techniques, and customer relationship skills.

• Represent the company at industry events, conferences, and trade shows to promote services and establish new contacts.

• Conduct regular performance evaluations of sales team members, providing constructive feedback and identifying areas for improvement.

• Continuously evaluate and refine sales processes, strategies, and customer engagement approaches to drive efficiency and effectiveness.

• Any adhoc duties as assigned by HOD

Job Requirements:

• Degree / Diploma in Mechanical Engineering

• Experience in ACMV or HVAC systems is advantage

• Possessed strong sales skills including prospecting, lead generation, negotiation, and closing deals. Effectively communicate the value proposition of maintenance contracts to meet client needs.

• Skilled in networking, rapport-building, and customer relationship management. Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, contractors, and other stakeholders is crucial.

• Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written, are necessary for interacting with clients, contractors, and other stakeholders.

• Ability to analyze complex maintenance issues, identify root causes, and develop effective solutions is crucial. Troubleshoot problems efficiently and make sound decisions under pressure.

• Diven by results and able to meet or exceed sales targets. Demonstrated ability to achieve sales quotas and grow revenue streams is highly valued.

Working hours:

Mon to Fri, 8:30am to 6pm

Company Overview

If you’re seeking for employment or employees, you’re at the right place.Welcome to Flintex Consulting, a leading Recruitment Agency in Singapore.


We Match                                            We Guide                                            We Place


We specialize in Technology, BFSI, Human Resource & Administration, Engineering & Manufacturing, Sales & Marketing,Finance & Accounting sectors.We cater to the needs of a) individual job candidates and b) companies seeking for the right employees to drive their business.


We have been able to construe and bridge the needs and demands of our individual and corporate clients. Our wide industry expertise and select client base enable us to foster fruitful careers rather than short-term jobs and placements.Our advanced placement platform is designed to match employee skill sets with current vacancies with perfect accuracy. We utilize an efficient, systematic and ultra-precise recruitment method that surpasses industry standards.


Flintex Consulting has been successful in collaborating multiple leading employers, vendors and clients. We also offer valuable insight to candidates and companies to maximize their recruitment efforts. Candidates are mentored towards finding the best-fit jobs to help build successful careers.We cover all levels of placement, from entry level professionals to mid-level and CEO level posts.We promise to provide the best suited jobs through our research-based methodologies merged with our top qualified personnel.


Flintex Consulting promises to grow your career the right way. Whether you are a client or a candidate, we have a streamlined platform to match your needs efficiently. With professional, efficient, and timely services, leave it to us when it comes to your Job-Related needs.We take pride in collaborating with leading employers, vendors, and clients. This helps us provide you with extensive job postings across all Major Industries. Additionally, we offer valuable insights and other personalized services designed to maximize productivity and results when it comes to job search.
